component.name: PlayerEpItem
component.script: sub init() m.ring = m.top.findNode("ring") m.poster = m.top.findNode("poster") m.lbl = m.top.findNode("lbl") end sub sub onContent() c = m.top.itemContent if c = invalid then return if c.hdPosterURL <> invalid and c.hdPosterURL <> "" then m.poster.uri = c.hdPosterURL m.lbl.text = c.title end sub sub onFocus() if m.top.focusPercent > 0.5 then m.ring.visible = true else m.ring.visible = false end if end sub
